title: Simple Minimalist Toolbar
description: Makes the toolbar look more minimalistic and simple.
body:
![toolbar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d2b1585b3a9d4116c03c7b4cde6ae88712a1b27.png)

I made a super simple minimalist toolbar

It has support for 1.7.10+ (Supports 1.21.10)

## Installation ##

Just put the downloaded resourepack in your C:\Users\username\AppData\Roaming\.minecraft\resourcepacks

You can get to this folder my going in game, settings, resourepacks, and hit open resourepack folder. Just put this folder in and voila this amazing pack will work.
